zh.Throcking Manor, Throcking, Hertfordshir: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾洛金
zh.Prittlewell, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可普利特列維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Grapenell於大約1274年出生時，她的父親Sir Henry Grapinel27歲，母親Margery26歲。她於大約1313年與Nicholas de Havering在英國英格蘭賀特福爾洛金結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年11月22日享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Grapenell于大约1274年出生时，她的父亲Sir Henry Grapinel27岁，母亲Margery26岁。她于大约1313年与Nicholas de Havering在英国英格兰賀特福爾洛金结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1334年11月22日享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grapenell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graveney
meanings: English: locative name from Graveney (Kent), which is recorded as Grafon aea in the 9th century, Gravenel in 1086, Grauenell in 1202, Grauene in 1402. The place-name means ‘river of the ditch’, from Old English * grafa ‘ditch’ (genitive * grafan) + ēa ‘river’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Grapenell was born about 1274, her father, Sir Henry Grapinel, was 27 and her mother, Margery, was 26. She married Nicholas de Havering about 1313, in Throcking, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 22 November 1334, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Grapenell est née environ 1274, son père, Sir Henry Grapinel, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Havering environ 1313, à Throcking, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1334, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Grapenell um 1274 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Grapinel 27 und ihre Mutter Margery 26. Sie hat um 1313 in Throcking, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas de Havering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. November 1334 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Grapenell è nata il circa 1274, sua padre, Sir Henry Grapinel, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margery, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Havering circa 1313, nel Throcking, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 novembre 1334, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Grapenellが約1274年に生まれた時，父Sir Henry Grapinelは27歳，母Margeryは26歳であった。約1313年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスロクイングでNicholas de Haveringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年11月22日に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Grapenell(이)가 대략 1274년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Grapinel(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스록잉에서 Nicholas de Havering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 11월 22일 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Grapenell nasceu aproximadamente 1274, seu pai, Sir Henry Grapinel, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Havering aproximadamente 1313, em Throcking, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1334, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Grapenell родилась около 1274 г., её отцу по имени Sir Henry Grapinel было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Havering около 1313 г. в местности троккинг, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 ноября 1334 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Grapenell nació aproximadamente 1274, su papá, Sir Henry Grapinel, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Havering aproximadamente 1313, en Throcking, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1334, a la edad de 61 años.
